title: HoloDiscs
body:
## About this mod
**HoloDiscs** - adds remixes and hololive themed songs with custom disc images made by the community.  
With over 50 discs that can be dropped by creeper, transformed from vanilla discs in the disc refinery or be obtained in creative mode.

## Disclaimer
This mod complies with [Hololive/Cover](https://hololivepro.com/en/terms/) derivative work guidelines and is not monetized.  
You are free to use it in any livestream/video, modpack or server, as long as you follow [Cover](https://hololivepro.com/en/terms/) rules.
